{{CargoRelic
|name=Silhouette of a Beauty
|class_id=20646
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=On the shimmering river lit by glowing streetlights are reflections of young ones happily dancing. The deity of the River of Wishes captured this moment of joy, freezing it as a silhouette in time, embodying the god's blessings for the beauty of the mortal world.
|fame=14
|art=34
|fth=16
|civ=17
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per 3 ART Relics gained, Snail DEF +1<br>ART Relics: 60/60
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per 3 ART Relics gained, Snail DEF +2<br>ART Relics: 60/60
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 ART Relics gained, Snail DEF +3<br>ART Relics: 60/60
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 ART Relics gained, Snail DEF +3<br>ART Relics: 60/60
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 ART Relics gained, Snail DEF +3<br>ART Relics: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
